label: Charades
description: Actor will act out a secret word. If someone guesses it correctly, the guesser and actor get to make everyone else drink. If the actor can't hack it, they will finish their drink.

label: Trivia
description: Glory and fame for those who answer correctly. Death and despair for those who do not.

label: Scategories
description: Player will be given a letter and a category. Five seconds to think of a word and 15 seconds to defend.

label: Fifty Fifty
description: Could be good, could be bad. How bad? How good? Who knows…
